name: Olama — Intel GPU LLM Stack
short_desc: Ollama LLM stack for Intel GPUs — Chat UI, web search, voice, RAG, pipelines
author: Crashcart

form_fields.label: Ollama API port
form_fields.hint: Host port for the raw Ollama API (used by external apps like Cursor or VS Code). Change if 11434 is already in use.

form_fields.label: Default model for new chats
form_fields.hint: Pre-selects this model in new conversations. Must match a pulled model name. Leave empty to let users pick.

form_fields.label: Parallel requests on GPU
form_fields.hint: Keep at 1 for Intel GPU to avoid VRAM fragmentation. Raise only if GPU has spare headroom.

form_fields.label: Max queued requests
form_fields.hint: How many requests can wait before Ollama rejects new ones with 503.

form_fields.label: Model keep-alive time
form_fields.hint: How long to keep a model loaded in VRAM after its last request (e.g. 5m, 30m, 0 for immediate unload, -1 for forever).

form_fields.label: Whisper STT model
form_fields.hint: Speech-to-text quality/speed tradeoff: tiny | base | small | medium | large-v3

form_fields.label: Pipelines API key
form_fields.hint: Shared secret between Open WebUI and the Pipelines container. Change this before exposing to a network.

form_fields.label: Enable authentication
form_fields.hint: When enabled, users must log in. The first user to register becomes admin.

form_fields.label: Allow new user signup
form_fields.hint: When authentication is enabled, controls whether new users can self-register.

form_fields.label: JWT secret key
form_fields.hint: Session signing key — set explicitly so user sessions survive container restarts. Leave empty for auto-generated.

form_fields.label: Enable image generation
form_fields.hint: Requires an AUTOMATIC1111 or ComfyUI service running on the same network. Off by default.
